pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh which queries 'APP-SERVER-01' and verifier.py which prompts VLM for 'APP-SERVER-01'
Found in verifier.py VLM prompt instructing to check for these exact categories
Found in setup_task.sh which launches Edge to this URL and install_adaudit_plus.ps1 which configures port 8081
Found in setup_adaudit_plus.ps1 login automation script using 'admin' as username
Found in install_adaudit_plus.ps1 and setup_adaudit_plus.ps1 which automate changing and using the password 'Admin@2024'

privileged_info_summary: The target server to add is 'APP-SERVER-01'. The required audit categories to enable are 'Logon Activity', 'Object Access', and 'Privilege Use'. The ADAudit Plus console is accessible at http://localhost:8081. The administrator credentials are admin / Admin@2024.
